TabInfo.description:
A single tab entry returned by [`TabListResult`].

`scope` reports how the requesting session sees this tab: tabs owned by the session's own Agent Window are tagged `agent`; everything else falls into `user`. (Other sessions' Agent Windows are filtered out before they reach this struct.)

scope.description: Where the tab sits relative to the requesting session: `user` or `agent`. `all` is a request-side filter only and never appears on an individual tab entry.

TabScope.description:
View scope for [`TabListParams`] (§6 sandbox table).

* `User` — tabs that live in any window other than an Agent Window. * `Agent` — tabs in the requesting session's Agent Window only. * `All` — both of the above; never reveals other sessions' Agent Windows (cross-session isolation per §6).
